title: Speedy Panther 2Pcs Dog Treat Dispenser Ball Toy Interactive Dog Toys for Boredom Teeth Cleaning Chew Toy Rubber Ball for Puppy Small Dogs (S)
features: Dog Treat Ball Food Dispenser Toy - The dog treat toy ball can train dogs on how to use their teeth to separate food, as a interactive dog toy to improve IQ, and also can help cleaning teeth. In addition, this dog ball toy can be used as a slow feeder toy.

Interactive Dog Toy Balls - You can put snacks or other small treats in the balls. As working to retrieve the tasty rewards, dogs challenge their intellect, burn extra energy, and stay out of mischief. The dog ball toys will keep dogs mentally and physically active while playing.

Indestructible Rubber Ball Chew Toy : Made of durable natural rubber, the dog ball chew toy can well bear the chewing of dogs and will not hurt the dogs teeth, also suitable as an interactive dog toy for the throwing and fetch game.
Ball Size: 2 Pack Dog IQ Treat Balls in 2 vibrant colors, Red and Blue. The puppy ball toy measures 5 cm/ 2", fit for puppy and small dogs and cats to play.
Easy To Clean - Super safe for your dog and easy to clean. Dishwasher safe.
